summary:
Partogram plotting should begin at 6 cm of cervical dilation, which marks the official start of the active phase of labor. This threshold is recommended because modern labor typically progresses more gradually before reaching this point, allowing for accurate tracking of fetal and maternal well-being during critical stages.  

\boxed{C}

\boxed{C}. Answer choice: D
